stories.title: Nationals 6, Cubs 3 — Bregman's 2 HRs Not Enough, Cubs Lose Series

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Nationals 6, Cubs 3.

Wiemer hit a 3-run homer off Imanaga in the first inning. Washington took the series 2-1.

Bregman hit TWO home runs. Happ hit one. It still wasn't enough.

Cubs fall to 1-2. Time to bounce back against the Angels. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Bregman's 2-HR Game — His First as a Cub, $175M Investment Arriving

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Alex Bregman hit his first two home runs as a Cub yesterday.

398 feet to center. Then one to right-center off the 8th-inning reliever.

Ian Happ immediately followed the first one. Back-to-back at Wrigley.

The $175M investment is showing up. 🔥

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Imanaga 0-1 — Tough Debut, But the Stuff Was There

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Imanaga lost his season debut. Also registered 7 strikeouts and 16 whiffs in five innings.

The stuff is still elite. The first inning — two singles after two strikeouts, then a 3-run homer — is what sank him.

He'll be fine. Don't panic.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Cubs vs. Angels Today — Cabrera's Home Debut, 1:20 PM CT

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Cubs baseball today. 1:20 PM CT. Wrigley Field.

Edward Cabrera makes his home debut vs. the Angels.

After dropping the series to Washington, this is the bounce-back game. Cabrera vs. a young Angels rotation.

Let's get this W. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong — 4-for-9, 2 SB, Living Up to the Extension

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong through 3 games:

4-for-9. Two stolen bases. Playing cleanup. Acting like someone who just signed a $115M deal.

In his first three career cleanup appearances. As a 24-year-old.

He's going to be a star for a long time in Chicago. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Suzuki Update — PCL Sprain, Targeting Early April Return

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Seiya Suzuki update: PCL sprain, right knee.

He's doing light running and hitting work. Manager Counsell says the return window is early April — possibly April 1-7.

This team needs him. He had 32 HR and 103 RBI last season. Fast return matters a lot.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Cubs 1-2 Early Season Take — It's a Long Season, But Here's What Needs Fixing

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Cubs are 1-2. Breathe.

The concern: Imanaga and Boyd both hurt by big first innings. 3 runs in Sunday's loss.

The solution: Suzuki back in early April. Steele by June.

The talent is real. This team is built to contend.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
